scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) with baseUri null throws IllegalArgumentException
pseudocode: TEST TC03_O1 parseInput overload String,String baseUri-null

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) with valid Reader and baseUri returns Document
scenarios.expectedResult:
returned Document is not null and document.baseUri() equals "http://site/" and document.body().html() contains "
OK
"
pseudocode: TEST TC04_O2 parseInput overload Reader,String positive

Reader reader = new StringReader("
OK
"); String baseUri = "http://site/";
Parser p = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()); Document doc = p.parseInput(reader, baseUri);

assert doc != null; assert doc.baseUri().equals("http://site/"); assert doc.body().html().contains("
OK
");

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) with reader null throws NullPointerException
pseudocode: TEST TC05_O2 parseInput overload Reader,String reader-null
Parser p = new Parser(new XmlTreeBuilder()); p.parseInput(reader, baseUri);

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) with baseUri empty string returns Document
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is not null and document.baseUri() equals "" and document.body().html() contains "<span/>"
pseudocode: TEST TC06_O2 parseInput overload Reader,String empty-baseUri
Reader reader = new StringReader("<span/>"); String baseUri = "";
Parser p = new Parser(new HtmlTreeBuilder()); Document doc = p.parseInput(reader, baseUri);
assert doc != null; assert doc.baseUri().equals(""); assert doc.body().html().contains("<span/>");
